Your Personalized Financial Blueprint

The Retirement Money Map shows exactly how your money will work throughout retirement.

What is the Retirement Money Map?

Our proprietary planning tool that creates a visual, year-by-year roadmap of your entire financial future.

More Than Just Numbers

Traditional financial plans are often filled with complex charts and confusing projections. The Retirement Money Map is different - it's a clear, visual representation that shows:

  • Year-by-Year Cash Flow: Exactly how much income you'll have each year
  • Account Balances: How your accounts will grow and change over time
  • Tax Projections: Your estimated tax burden in each year of retirement
  • Withdrawal Strategy: Which accounts to tap and when
  • Legacy Planning: What you'll leave to beneficiaries
  • Scenario Testing: What happens if markets perform differently

Visual Planning Benefits

See your entire retirement laid out clearly:

30
Years Projected

Most planning tools show generic scenarios. Our Money Map is built specifically for your situation, with your actual accounts, your timeline, and your goals.

Personalized Visual Comprehensive

Creating Your Money Map

1

Organize

We gather all your financial information: accounts, income sources, expenses, goals, and concerns.

2

Plan

Create your personalized Money Map showing year-by-year projections with optimized tax and withdrawal strategies.

3

Implement

Execute the strategies outlined in your Money Map with proper account structures and investment allocation.

4

Monitor

Regular updates to your Money Map as circumstances change, keeping your plan on track.

What's Included in Your Money Map

Analysis 1

Income Analysis

Detailed breakdown of all income sources throughout retirement:

  • Social Security projections
  • Pension income
  • Investment withdrawals
  • Part-time work income
  • Rental or business income
Analysis 2

Tax Planning

Year-by-year tax projections and optimization strategies:

  • Federal and state tax estimates
  • Roth conversion opportunities
  • IRMAA avoidance strategies
  • Tax-efficient withdrawal sequencing
  • Municipal bond analysis
Analysis 3

Scenario Testing

Multiple scenarios to test your plan's resilience:

  • Market volatility scenarios
  • Inflation impact analysis
  • Early retirement scenarios
  • Health care cost projections
  • Long-term care planning
Analysis 4

Estate Planning

Legacy projections and wealth transfer strategies:

  • Beneficiary projections
  • Estate tax analysis
  • Trust planning opportunities
  • Charitable giving strategies
  • Asset protection planning
Analysis 5

Risk Management

Comprehensive protection planning:

  • Insurance needs analysis
  • Medicare planning
  • Asset allocation optimization
  • Sequence of returns risk
  • Emergency fund planning
Analysis 6

Implementation Plan

Step-by-step action plan to optimize your situation:

  • Account consolidation recommendations
  • Investment reallocation strategy
  • Tax optimization moves
  • Estate planning updates needed
  • Timeline for all actions

Sample Money Map Scenarios

Age 60
Early Retirement

John & Mary's Map

Want to retire at 62 with $850K saved. Their Money Map shows exactly how to bridge the gap until Social Security kicks in, including optimal Roth conversion strategies.

Bridge Strategy Roth Conversions
Age 65
Traditional Retirement

Robert's Map

Retiring at 65 with $1.2M and a pension. His Money Map optimizes Social Security claiming and manages his pension to minimize lifetime taxes while maximizing income.

SS Optimization Pension Planning
Age 70
Legacy Focus

Susan's Map

Already retired with $2M, focused on leaving a legacy. Her Money Map shows how to minimize estate taxes while funding a comfortable lifestyle.

Estate Planning Legacy Optimization

Benefits of the Money Map Approach

Clarity & Confidence

No more wondering if you'll have enough money. Your Money Map shows exactly where you stand and what adjustments might be needed.

What Clients Say:

"For the first time, we can actually see our retirement. The Money Map gave us the confidence to retire when we wanted to."

Proactive Planning

Identify potential problems years before they occur, giving you time to make adjustments and optimize your strategy.

Early Warning System:

  • Market downturns impact
  • Tax law changes
  • Spending adjustments needed
  • Legacy planning opportunities

Tax Optimization

Our Money Map identifies the optimal years for Roth conversions, major purchases, and other tax-sensitive decisions.

$180K
Average Tax Savings

Typical client saves this amount over retirement through optimized tax strategies.

Adaptable Strategy

Life changes, and your Money Map can be updated to reflect new circumstances, goals, or market conditions.

Common Updates:

  • Health changes
  • Market performance
  • Family situations
  • Law changes
  • Goal modifications

Getting Your Money Map

1

Initial Consultation

We'll discuss your goals, current situation, and determine if the Money Map process is right for you.

2

Data Gathering

Secure collection of all financial information needed to build your comprehensive Money Map.

3

Map Creation

Our team builds your personalized Money Map with detailed analysis and recommendations.

4

Presentation

We walk through your Money Map, explaining every detail and answering all your questions.

Investment Required

The Money Map process requires a significant time investment from our team. We only create Money Maps for families we're working with comprehensively.

This isn't a one-time planning exercise - it's an ongoing process that evolves with your needs and circumstances.

Ready to See Your Financial Future?

Your Money Map awaits. Let's create a clear, confident path to your retirement goals.

Start Your Money Map Call 801.210.2800

Initial consultations are complimentary for qualified families.
